files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-3582-add-tokenize-and-detokenize-endpoints-to-ollama-server",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Add Tokenize and Detokenize Endpoints to Ollama Server",
+    "description": "Add Tokenize and Detokenize Endpoints to Ollama Server. Requested by 108+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis feature requires Ollama with tokenize/detokenize support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the tokenize and detokenize API",
+        "description": "Ollama added tokenize and detokenize endpoints to the server API:\n- **Tokenize**: Convert text into token IDs used by the model\n- **Detokenize**: Convert token IDs back into text\n\nThis is useful for understanding token counts, prompt engineering, and working with token-level operations."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use the tokenize and detokenize endpoints",
+        "description": "Test the tokenize endpoint:\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/tokenize \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"llama3\", \"text\": \"Hello, world!\"}'\n```\n\nTest the detokenize endpoint:\n```bash\ncurl -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/detokenize \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"llama3\", \"tokens\": [9906, 11, 1917, 0]}'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Confirm both endpoints return correct results:\n1. Tokenize a known string and verify you get token IDs back\n2. Detokenize the returned token IDs and verify you get the original text\n```bash\nollama list\n```\nEnsure the model you are testing with is available locally."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added tokenize and detokenize API endpoints to the Ollama server, allowing users to convert between text and token IDs for any loaded model.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
